title: BEM-867 verify Claude battle step
objective:
Run script:
"""
p = Path('.github/workflows/claude.yml')
text = p.read_text(encoding='utf-8', errors='ignore') if p.exists() else ''
checks = {
    'claude_exists': p.exists(),
    'has_bem867_step': 'BEM-867 mailbox write for battle audit' in text,
    'has_trace_condition': "inputs.trace_id == 'bem867_battle_audit_mailbox'" in text,
    'has_mailbox_path': 'BEM867_BATTLE_AUDIT_RESPONSE.md' in text,
    'has_commit_anchor': 'Commit transport and report' in text,
}
status = 'BEM867_STEP_PRESENT' if checks['has_bem867_step'] and checks['has_trace_condition'] and checks['has_mailbox_path'] else 'BEM867_STEP_MISSING'
marker = Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM867_VERIFY_CLAUDE_BATTLE_STEP_' + status + '.md')
marker.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
marker.write_text('# BEM-867 verify Claude battle step\nStatus: ' + status + '\n' + '\n'.join('- ' + k + ': ' + str(v) for k,v in checks.items()) + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(marker))
ops_applied.append('BEM867 verify Claude battle step: ' + status)
"""
No issue comments.
